creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

As long as you cannot behave like a normal human being and respect the 
freebsd people that are trying to help you, you will find no ground to 
request changes within FreeBSD. I will close the PR and never reopen it 
because of -your- attitude, not only this time, but also with the 
discussion between qjail/ezjail and the previous years.
